title: AssetInsightsOperator
content:
# AssetInsightsOperator

Type of operation for the filter, allowed operators: '==', '!=', '<', '>', '>=', '<=', 'has', '!has', 'contains', '!contains', 'starts_with', '!starts_with', 'ends_with', '!ends_with'

## Enum Values

- `==`
- `!=`
- `<`
- `>`
- `>=`
- `<=`
- `has`
- `!has`
- `contains`
- `!contains`
- `starts_with`
- `!starts_with`
- `ends_with`
- `!ends_with`
